creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 184157
Update from 4.10.0 to 4.10.4

Hello

I have been running the attached changes locally for some time.  Maybe it could be updated in the FreeBSD ports?

Also, please note that I am working on sysutils/puppet5.  I'll get in touch with you and other puppet-related ports when I get to some result in order to gather feedback and reviews.  Stay tuned!
